achievements.description: Starting as the British India Company, fully own the states of Sind and Punjab
Starting as Finland, produce at least 100 units of tanks every week
Starting as Luxembourg, be the leading producer of Luxury Clothes, Luxury Furniture, and Porcelain
As Great Britain, have an Anarchist form of government
Starting as Egypt, form Arabia and own East Thrace
Starting as the Sikh Empire, subjugate Great Britain
As Brazil, change government to Republic and implement Universal Suffrage
As the USA, own California, Oregon and Washington with 250k or more population in each state
Starting as Great Qing, have a treaty port in France, Germany, the British Isles, Iberia and Italy
As France, become a Council Republic and have a Command Economy
Starting as Algeria, retake Algiers and become a Major Power
Starting as Lanfang, incorporate all states in Borneo and have the 'Compulsory Primary School' law
As the Ottomans, be the Greatest Power while having max level Public Health Insurance
As Austria, own Silesia and Prussia must be Minor Power or lower rank
As Russia, own the entire Central Asia region
As Spain, have an average standard of living of at least 20 while remaining a monarchy
As Mexico, own the Pacific Coast, Great Plains & Texas, and have a higher Power Rank than the USA
Starting as the Indian Territory, have the USA as a subject with no more than three states
As Italy join a diplomatic play against 2 or more of your allies
Starting as Prussia, form Germany and fully own at least 10 states in Africa
Starting as France, have the highest GDP and Innovation generation in the world
Pass the Women's Suffrage law
Be the first nation in the world to fly aeroplanes
Play a full campaign from 1836 to 1936
Have a cultural migration target in one of your states
Have a national GDP of at least £1 billion
Starting as a nation with Serfdom, enact Worker’s Protections Labor Rights Law
Form the nation of Italy
Form the nation of Germany
Form the nation of Ethiopia
Form the nation of Scandinavia
Have electrical street lights in all states while being an Autocracy
Have the other side back down in a diplomatic play
Switch sides to the revolutionaries in a civil war and win the ensuing conflict
As a nation starting with less than 20% literacy, get to 95% literacy
As Great Britain, Expel French Diplomats while having Cordial or better relations
Have an institution at maximum investment level
Have at least a level 8 port and export at least 2500 units of Opium to foreign markets
Form Grand Colombia and own all land in the Gran Colombia, Andes, and La Plata strategic regions
Research all technologies across all three categories
Complete the 'Learn the Game' objective
Complete the 'Economic Dominance' objective
Complete the 'Hegemon' objective
Complete the 'Egalitarian Society' objective
As the United States, have 100 incorporated states represented on your flag
As a Yankee nation, pass the Industry Banned Law before 1846 and have at least 20 average Standard of Living
Pass the State Atheism Law and have the Intelligentsia be Powerful
Cement the Bonaparte dynasty, become a Republic, and Stamp Out Monarchism
Complete the Natural Borders of France Journal Entry
As France, prevent Germany from unifiying until 1930
Pass a Law with the support of an Agitator
As the USA, become a Monarchy with Joshua Norton as monarch
Exile an Agitator with at least 100 Popularity
Have an invited Exile become the ruler of your nation and pass the Closed Borders Law
As France, defeat the rebellion of the Paris Commune
Have the Armed Forces coup the government
Unite Germany and have Max Stirner rule your nation
Pass the Single-Party State, Militarized Police, and Outlawed Dissent Laws
Pass the Homesteading Law and be the leading producer of Grain and Groceries
Complete the Restoration Journal Entries as Japan before 1912
As Brazil, complete the Magnanimous Monarch Journal Entry and preserve the monarchy
Form the Federation of the Andes
As Krakow, form Poland-Lithuania and complete the Expanding the Commonwealth Journal Entry
As Brazil, make Getulio Vargas the ruler of your nation, and complete the New Republic Journal Entry
As Bolivia, successfully form the Peru-Bolivian Confederation
As a Romanian nation, form Romania and directly own all Romanian homeland states
Starting as Piratini or Grão-Para, have a higher GDP than Brazil
Have three companies at max prosperity at the same time
As a Yankee or Dixie nation, achieve maximum prosperity with the United Fruit Company and have at least 75 Banana Plantations
As Paraguay, complete the Expanding Paraguay and Populating the Americas Journal Entries
As the Papal States, become the Roman Republic and then form Italy
Complete the Exploiting the Amazon Journal Entry, own all Amazon states, and construct railways in them
As a subject, have the pro-overlord lobby at max appeasement
Look at me. As a member of a power bloc, win the struggle for power bloc leadership
Have a fully decked out power bloc
As any country, have both Finland and Korea in your power bloc
As Herat, form Afghanistan, own all the historical states of the old Durrani Empire, and do not be a member of any power bloc led by any other country
Complete the Great Game Objective
As Circassia, complete the Honor Before Life journal entry
As Persia, complete the Eastern Frontier Journal Entry, and have a literacy rating of 80%

achievements.displayName: For Twelve Years You Have Been Asking
achievements.description: Privatize all buildings and prevent them from being state or worker-owned for 12 whole years
As a country with at least 10% of your GDP owned by a foreign power, nationalize all buildings and prevent them from being privatized for 12 whole years
Own at least 30 levels of oil rigs in foreign countries
As a Great Power, have a pro-country lobby for your country in every other Great Power
As Korea, act on the Donghak movement's petitions
Pass the State Atheism Law and be the leader of an ideological power bloc with at least 10 members
Starting as a subject nation, break free from your overlord
As a council republic with command economy, have a company at max prosperity
As the Mughal Empire, complete the Prisoner of the Red Fort journal entry, expel the British, and bring all of India under your control
Be prepared and avert a famine during a high-intensity harvest condition
As Punjab, have four rulers die during the Sikh Sovereignty Journal Entry, before successfully completing it
Enact Affirmative Action as a country with the British Indian caste system
Have a Communist Movement with support over 50%
As Sweden, enact Corporate State and have level 5 Social Security, Health, and Workplace Safety institutions
Have 10 non-primary cultures present in your country, and have all their constituent pops be at Full Acceptance
Have Gandhi as your head of state, whilst having Infamy over 100

achievements.displayName: The Man Who Would be King
achievements.description: Unify Afghanistan as Kafiristan under Josiah Harlan
Fully blockade a World Market Hub that is connected to at least 100 Trade Centers
Have an automotive company establish a country via a colony and have a top 10 GDP
As Venice, have the most Trade Centers in the world
Produce prestige good Gros Michel Banana from United Fruit Company and get 25% share of total goods on World Market
Have 10 or more articles in a single treaty
As Switzerland, make more than 10% of your GDP from money transfer through treaties
Establish a Regional HQ and have it own at least 20 levels
As a Council Republic, produce more than 100 units of Champagne
As Sweden, have a Country Monopoly on Liquor

achievements.displayName: All Quiet on the Western Front
achievements.description: Have over a million casualties on a single front
As Austria, complete the Federal Solution Journal Entry, and form the United States of Greater Austria
As Austria, complete the Autocracy in the Age of Liberty Journal Entry
As Hungary, complete the Hungarian Revolution Journal Entry, and achieve independence
Form the nation of Yugoslavia
As a member of the Balkan League, complete the Spoils of War Journal Entry
Starting as Montenegro, exist whilst the Ottoman Empire does not
As Bulgaria, complete the Prussia of the Balkans Journal Entry, and have higher prestige than Prussia
As Serbia, own Saxony
As Austria, be the number 1 producer of art and furniture
As any independent country, have the fervor of any primary culture reach 100
As Cuba, have a 25% share of global sugar exports, and a total export volume of over 2000 units
As Spain, complete the Reconquista Journal Entry
As Spain, switch to an Anarchist revolution or secession, and win the ensuing conflict
As Spain, complete the Economic Regeneration Journal Entry without reducing objectives or employing creative accounting
As any Muslim country, convert Spain to Islam
As Portugal, have a Personal Union with both Brazil and Spain
As the Phillipines, rebuild the Manila Cathedral after an earthquake

achievements.displayName: Portugal is Not a Small Country!
achievements.description: As Portugal, own at least 12 states in Africa, and establish a direct land connection between Angola and Mozambique
Starting with at least two non-marginal Interest Groups opposing a law, remove all opposition to the law's enactment
Starting as Spain, win the Carlist Wars, and then elect the Carlist candidate after the Glorious Revolution
